Place car images in this folder.

Naming rule (all lowercase):
<brand>-<model>.<ext>

Supported ext: .png, .jpg, .jpeg, .webp

Examples:
toyota-camry.png
honda-city.jpg
hyundai-creta.webp
kia-seltos.png
maruti-suzuki-grand-vitara.jpg
mahindra-xuv700.png
tata-nexon.png
volkswagen-virtus.jpg
skoda-slavia.jpeg
mg-hector.png
toyota-innova-hycross.jpg
hyundai-verna.png
